channel.title: The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content on The Hidden Port

item.title: 5 Critical AWS Security Misconfigurations (2026 Edition) – How to Find & Fix Them
item.description: A practical guide to the five most common AWS security misconfigurations in 2026 and how to fix them using the AWS Console and Terraform.

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore: Full Policy Breakdown
item.description: What AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore actually permits, when to use it for Session Manager, and how to build a scoped-down custom policy for production.

item.title: AWS Incident Response: 5 Scenarios & How to Contain Them
item.description: Handle real AWS security incidents step by step. Covers compromised keys, public S3 buckets, cryptomining, privilege escalation, and automated containment.

item.title: AWS Security Checklist 2026: 30+ Controls for IAM, EC2 & S3
item.description: Free 2026 AWS security checklist with 30+ actionable controls. Covers IAM hardening, S3 lockdown, CloudTrail logging, encryption, and compliance basics.

item.title: EKS Security Best Practices: Hardening Your Cluster
item.description: Harden Amazon EKS with RBAC, network policies, pod security standards, image scanning, secrets encryption, and node lockdown. Practical guide with YAML examples.

item.title: IAM Users Are Dead: Modern AWS Access Control for 2026
item.description: Why AWS IAM users are obsolete in 2026 - and how to implement secure, scalable alternatives with Identity Center, OIDC, and temporary credentials.

item.title: Meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2: A Practical Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guidance on meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2 in AWS. Learn how to map controls, audit compliance, and automate remediation using AWS services and open-source tools.

item.title: EKS Security: Monitoring, Audit Logs & Runtime Detection
item.description: Secure Amazon EKS clusters with CloudWatch, GuardDuty, audit logs, and Falco runtime detection. Includes architecture examples and common pitfalls.

item.title: eJPTv2: Prep Strategy, Resources & Honest Review
item.description: How I prepared for the eJPTv2 exam coming from cloud security. Study plan, TryHackMe labs, INE course review, and tips for the Junior Penetration Tester cert.

item.title: What Is IDOR? Finding and Preventing Insecure Direct Object References in AWS APIs
item.description: A technical deep-dive into IDOR vulnerabilities, real bug-bounty cases, AWS API examples, detection, prevention strategies, and how to secure your AWS services.

item.title: Amazon GuardDuty Setup: Findings, Alerts & SIEM Integration
item.description: Enable GuardDuty, understand finding types, set up alerting, and integrate with your SIEM. Step-by-step guide with Terraform and console walkthroughs.

item.title: Detect AWS IAM Privilege Escalation with CloudTrail
item.description: How to detect IAM privilege escalation in AWS using CloudTrail events, EventBridge rules, and real-world API patterns. Includes alerting setup and Terraform.

item.title: Building a Hardened Amazon Linux 2 AMI for Secure EC2 Deployments
item.description: Learn how to create a hardened, compliant Amazon Linux 2 AMI using EC2 Image Builder with CIS benchmarks, security tools, and automation for production-ready AWS environments.

item.title: IAM Least Privilege in AWS: Access Analyzer Guide
item.description: Audit and tighten IAM permissions using Access Analyzer, CloudTrail, and service last-accessed data. Step-by-step workflows for enforcing least privilege.

item.title: Replace SSH with Session Manager: Secure EC2 Access Guide
item.description: Stop using SSH keys and bastion hosts. Set up AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure, auditable EC2 access with no inbound ports.

item.title: EC2 Hardening Guide: Secure AWS Instances Step by Step
item.description: Harden EC2 instances with IAM least privilege, OS lockdown, encryption, logging, and CIS benchmark checks. Practical guide with console and Terraform examples.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Toolkit: Resources & Templates
item.description: Complete AWS incident response toolkit. Includes playbooks, templates, tools, and guidance for cloud security teams.

item.title: AWS Security Monitoring Tools: Setup & Best Practices
item.description: Set up AWS security monitoring with GuardDuty, CloudTrail, Security Hub, and EventBridge. Practical architectures for threat detection on any budget.

item.title: AWS Temporary Credentials & IAM Roles: Security Best Practices
item.description: How to use IAM roles, STS, and temporary credentials securely. Covers least privilege, session policies, credential expiration, and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Guide for Small Security Teams
item.description: Build an AWS incident response process using CloudTrail, GuardDuty, and automation. Includes free playbook template, forensic steps, and Terraform code.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Playbook Template (Free)
item.description: Free AWS incident response playbook with isolation workflows, evidence collection steps, and post-incident reporting checklists. Ready to use.

item.title: How I Passed the AWS Certified Security – Specialty (SCS-C02) Exam in 2025
item.description: My real-world journey passing the AWS Certified Security – Specialty (SCS-C02) exam. Study strategies, mistakes, resources, and tips for future candidates.

item.title: Disclaimer
item.description: Disclaimer regarding affiliate links and content on The Hidden Port.

item.title: All Blog Posts
item.description: Browse all articles grouped by category.

item.title: Building Least-Privilege IAM Roles with IAM Access Analyzer
item.description: Learn how to use IAM Access Analyzer to identify risky permissions, generate fine-tuned IAM policies, and integrate the tool into your AWS development workflow.

item.title: How to Detect AWS Root Account Usage (And Respond to It)
item.description: This guide walks you through detecting and responding to AWS root account usage using CloudTrail, EventBridge, SNS, and optionally Lambda or Slack. Includes Terraform examples and AWS Console workflows.

item.title: About
item.description:
Hi! I’m Javier Pulido, a Cloud Security Engineer with a passion for making complex infrastructure safe, automated, and compliant. Over the past several years, I’ve helped my company build and secure their AWS environment using infrastructure-as-code, identity federation, and proactive monitoring.

Core Expertise

  • AWS Governance & Landing Zones
    Designing multi-account structures with AWS Control Tower, Service Catalog and Secure Baselines to enforce least‑privilege and separation of duties.

  • Identity & Access Management
    Implementing AWS SSO via Google IdP, fine‑grained permission provisioning with Terraform modules, and session tagging strategies across Bitbucket Pipelines.

item.title: Security Resources
item.description: A curated collection of tools, blogs, and documentation to help you secure your AWS environment and build resilient infrastructure.
